'''''Classic Adventures''''' is an anthology of two previously published ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventures. It was released by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].

==Contents==
{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Adventures}}
*''[[The Politics of Contraband]]''
*[[The Abduction|''The Abduction of Crying Dawn Singer'']]
